movie.actors: Glynis Johns, Steve Railsback, Ronald France, Siphiwe Mlangeni
movie.plot: Two aliens, Nukie and Miko, crash-land on different parts of the Earth. Miko is quickly captured by an American space agency, while Nukie, who has landed in the middle of the African savannah, wanders about until he befriends two young children. Will Miko survive the scientists' experiements? Will Nukie ever be reunited with his space-travelling companion?
movie.title: Nukie
